description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  Rated with 4 stars, this high-quality property provides guests with access to restaurant, fitness center and indoor pool on-site.

comments.reviewComments: Recommended hotel. Strategic location close to the city, friendly staff. The rooms are spacious, clean, and fragrant.
comments.originalComment:
Recommended hotelnya.
Lokasi strategis dekat dengan kota, stafnya ramah.
Kamarnya luas, bersih dan wangi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: The mirror position may need some adjustment, standing in front of it, the head is gone, also the fitness equipment has been obsolete and need replacement
comments.reviewPositives: Good location, right at the side of the major road, next to the hotel is fast food KFC, spacious room, strong shower, good wifi, basement parking available, decent breakfast, the omelet and sunny side-up thumbs up, also friendly and responsive staff members ....
comments.reviewTitle: Room Quite Satisfying, Facilities Need Some Care

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon is one of the best hotels in Central Aceh. It is strategically located on the main road, close to Lake Laut Tawar and also places of worship. The staff are friendly, the conditions are clean, and the prices are affordable.
comments.reviewTitle: Staycation at Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon
comments.originalTitle: Staycation di Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon
comments.originalComment:
Hotel Grand Bayu Hill Takengon adalah salah satu hotel terbaik di Aceh Tengah.
Letaknya sangat strategis dipinggir jalan utama, dekat ke Danau Laut Tawar dan juga tempat ibadah.
Stafnya ramah, dan juga kondisinya bersih, dengan harga yang affordable

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Friendly service, breakfast with many options, safe swimming pool facilities for children.
comments.originalComment: Pelayanan ramah,  sarapan pagi banyak pilihan, fasilitas  kolam renang yang aman untuk anak anak

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: La camera non era pulita. Non hanno la base di quello che vuole dire la pulizia. Le asciugamani non avevano un bel aspetto né un buon odore, c'era puzza in bagno. C'era polvere nelle superfici. Il bagno non era stato pulito a dovere, la doccia era indecente. Mi dispiace per alcuni del personale, ma il proprietario o booking deve fare un corso di formazione per tenere pulito un albergo del genere.
comments.reviewPositives: Mi è piaciuta la organizzazione della colazione, abbiamo gradito che c'era anche un poco di scelta al solito menù indonesiano. Il personale è stato cortese e disponibile. Il ragazzo della reception è stato di grande aiuto. Il letto era abbastanza pulito e comodo.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
City center hotel  
Nice  
New  
Friendly staff  
Delicious breakfast with many options  
The pool is also very enjoyable for kids
comments.originalComment:
Hotel'a di tengah kota 
Bagus 
Baru 
Staff ramah 
Sarapan enak dan banyak pilihan
Kolam renang jg sangat menyenangkan utk anak

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Hoe ontzettend goor de badkamer was de douche kwam niet hoger dan onze schouders. Er zaten vlekken, haren sn etensresten in het bed. We hebben 3 keer roomservice moeten bellen om het een beetje schoner te krijgen.
Het inpandig zwembad had groene aanslag op de tegels en er dreef een olielaagje op.
De ontbijtzaal was net zoals onze kamer. Heel vies dus 
We zijn na 1 nacht voortijdig uitgecheckt en naar een ander onderkomen gevlucht.
comments.reviewPositives: De binnenkomst en het vriendelijke personeel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: With an affordable price, you get good facilities and a breakfast with quite a variety.
comments.originalComment: Dengan harga yang terjangkau mendapatkan fasilitas yang bagus dan sarapan pagi cukup banyak variasinya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Recommend, clean, neat, fragrant, friendly staff, but unfortunately the room has no ventilation at all, even though the room is large it feels cramped because there are no windows.
comments.originalComment: Recommend, bersih, rapih, wangi, staff ramah, tp sayang room tidak ada ventilasi sama sekali, meskipun ruangan besar jd terkesan sesak karna tidak ada jendela

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Sangat Mengecewakan – Tidak Layak Disebut Hotel Bintang 4

Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat mengecewakan. Informasi di aplikasi tidak sesuai dengan kenyataan. Aturan tidak jelas—tidak memperbolehkan saudara kandung sekamar, hanya istri atau anak kandung yang diperbolehkan. Saat sudah masuk kamar baru ditlp, kenapa tidak ditanya saat check in tadi ?.Ini sangat membingungkan dan tidak pernah dijelaskan sebelumnya. Sehingga terpaksa menambah kamar. Benar² merusak suasana hati dan liburan kami, keluarga yg menyusul akhirnya saya minta untuk ke hotel lain saja. 😡 

Fasilitas gym rusak total dan membahayakan. Kamar sangat kotor: jendela dan cermin penuh debu dan tahi cicak, sprei dan selimut juga ada kotoran cicak. AC tidak ada remote, hanya disuruh pakai double selimut. Kamar mandi bau bangkai dan setelah lapor pun hanya ditambah kamper namun bau tetap sama. Dinding kamar berjamur sampai menyebabkan pusing saat bangun tidur. Water heater juga tidak berfungsi dengan baik—air tidak panas dan tidak stabil.

Toiletries tidak lengkap, alat tulis tidak disediakan, dan kebersihan kamar sangat buruk. Sarapan sangat biasa saja, peralatan makan kotor, gelas ada bercak² kotoran seperti gelas yang sudah sangat lama disimpan, hanya salad yang menurut saya lumayan.

Harga dan fasilitas sangat tidak sebanding. Sama sekali tidak mencerminkan hotel bintang 4—pelayanan dan kualitasnya bahkan tidak lebih baik dari wisma atau penginapan murah.

Saya datang dari jauh untuk beristirahat, tapi justru mendapat pengalaman yang sangat mengecewakan. Sangat tidak direkomendasikan. Lebih baik pilih hotel lain yang benar-benar menghargai kenyamanan tamu.

Ternyata sesuai dengan review bahwa hotel ini buruk sekali

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The swimming pool can only be used from 11 AM, while checkout is at 12 PM. This needs to be looked into again because visitors often choose hotels to swim. The floor in the room is a bit slippery, perhaps because soap is sprayed and then mopped. It would be better to mix the soap with water and mop using a bucket so that the floor does not feel sticky and slippery.
comments.originalComment: Kolam renang baru bisa d gunakan pukul 11 pagi sementara pukul 12 sudah wkt nya chekout, perlu d perhatikan lagi krn tujuan pengunjung memilih hotel terkadang krn mau berenang, lantai kamar sedikit licin mungkin saat mengepel sabun pel di semprotkan kemudian dipel, sebaiknya sabun di campur air dan dipel menggunakan ember agar lantai tidak terasa lengket dan licin

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Service and facilities need to be improved. Check-in took a long time, more than 1 hour, towels were also not provided. The breakfast refill took too long, and the taste did not match expectations.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Westafelnya sempet mati airnya, begitupun flush toiletnya. Katanya AC Central sih, tapi gakerasa sama sekali.
Untuk masalah AC gapapa sih, karna gaakan kepanasan juga disana. 
Kalau ada orang diluar kamar ngobrol kedengaran ke kamar, bahkan tetangga samping kamar bersin terdengar wkwkw. apa ini pengaruh AC ga idup yaa? saya kurang ngerti juga sih.
Makanannya enak, okeey. tapi jarang di refill sama petugasnya. 
oke sih untuk harga segitu.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This is my 2nd time staying at this hotel. Facilities are very good, the rooftop restaurant and view is superb. It got minimarket at 2nd floor and swimming pool at ground floor. KFC chains restaurant is there as well if your kids not into local foods.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Big Room.. really big!! King bed and very comfotable. But the breakfast need to improve. Overall the staf, room and facilities is great. If you plan to stay here, pleasee go to the Cafe Kuren just infront hotel. They have really goodd coffee. I will repeat again to Takegon all the way from Malaysia. 🤩

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel service is very good, the facilities are decent, there is a KFC restaurant below the hotel, the air is very cool here, the kids are very happy especially with the swimming pool here... I hope to have the opportunity to come back again 😊😊
comments.originalComment: Pelayanan hotel sangat baik, fasilitas lumayan,ada restoran KFC dibawah hotel,udara sangat sejuk disini,anak" sangat senang ditambah lagi ada kolam renang disini....semoga berkesempatan untuk datang lagi 😊😊

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Unexpectedly is a very good hotel with many facilities, especially good for family. Try relaxing in the rooftop cafe at night! Those who bring kids can rest assured as they have swimming pool and even playground. KFC is located just besides of the hotel, perfect if you or your kids are not into local food. Their breakfast is very generous in the serving. It also has minimarket for your daily necessity.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Best for facilities, the location is easy to find, although a bit far from tourist spots, but easy to park vehicles.
comments.originalComment: Terbaik untuk fasilitas, lokasi midah di temukan, salau agak jauh ke lokasi wisata, tp mudah untuk parkir kendaraan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Perlu di lakukan pengembangan untuk fasilitas hotel. Sayang Hotel Bintang 4 tapi fasilitas bintang 2. 
Untuk Harga lumayan murah dari sekelasnya, tapi fasilitas dan pelayanan perlu di benahi dan di standarkan.
Lokasi Ok banget.
Untuk kelas hotel. Rekomendasi ke rekan blom bisa saya rekomended baik dinas maupun rekreasi keluarga. Maaf..

comments.responseText:
Yang Terhormat Bapak Hamdani
Terima kasih sudah memilih Grand Bayu Hill Hotel Takengon sebagai tempat akomodasi Bapak selama berada di Takengon.
Semoga kedepanannya Bapak tetap memilih Grand Bayu Hill sebagai tempat akomodasi jika berkunjung ke Takengon
Salam sehat dan sukses selama untuk Bapak

Management

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Cocok buat nginap. Tapi sayangnya fasilitas kolam berenangnya saat saya berkunjung tidak bisa dipakai. Pdhal anak anak sudah sangat senang mengetahui hotel ada kolam berenangnya. Dan cafe rooftop nya tidak sesuai ekspektasi digambar.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: AC central, tidak dingin. Kepanasan tdr malam. Sarapan menunya banyak dan lezat. Saya pesan 2 kamar deluxe (pakai aplikasi), rupanya tnp view. Ditawarkan upgrade ke grand deluxe (view danau) saat pertama kali sampai

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Kita batal menginap katanya direfund berbulan-bulan tidak ada kepastian dari puhak hotel. Sangat tidak direkomendasikan. Di waktu libur panjang kolam berenang malah dikuras padahal itu yang kita tuju. Satu-satunya hotel yang ada kolam berenangnya
comments.reviewTitle: Kita batal menginap dan meminta refund tapi tidak direfund
